lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸਮੂਹਾ ਭੋਗ ਭੂਮਿ ਸਬਾਈ ਕੋ ਧਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sukh samoohaa bhog bhoom sabaaee ko dhanee |
lines.english: Even if one were to enjoy all pleasures, and be master of the entire earth,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਭੋ ਰੋਗੁ ਮਿਰਤਕ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak habho rog miratak naam vihooniaa |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, all of that is just a disease. Without the Naam, he is dead. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਸੜੀ ਨਿਬਾਹਿ ਮਾਨੁਖ ਪਰਥਾਈ ਲਜੀਵਦੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak aasarree nibaeh maanukh parathaaee lajeevado |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, He alone fulfills your hopes; you should feel embarrassed, visiting other places. ||3||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਕਸ ਕੂੰ ਤੂ ਆਹਿ ਪਛਾਣੂ ਭੀ ਹਿਕੁ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: hikas koon too aaeh pachhaanoo bhee hik kar |
lines.english: Yearn for the One Lord, and make Him your friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal naam nidhaan hai jis simarat har laadhaa |
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam is eternal and imperishable. Meditating in remembrance on Him, the Lord is attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਏਕੁ ਨਰਾਇਣੋ ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮ ਅਗਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal ek naraaeino har agam agaadhaa |
lines.english: The One and only Lord is eternal, imperishable, inaccessible and incomprehensible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਵਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal keeratan gun gobind guramukh gaavaadhaa |
lines.english: The Kirtan of His Praises is eternal and imperishable; the Gurmukh sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਤਪੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੋ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਅਰਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: sach dharam tap nihachalo din rain araadhaa |
lines.english: Truth, righteousness, Dharma and intense meditation are eternal and imperishable. Day and night, worship the Lord in adoration.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਧਰਮੁ ਤਪੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੋ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਰਮਿ ਲਿਖਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: deaa dharam tap nihachalo jis karam likhaadhaa |
lines.english: Compassion, righteousness, Dharma and intense meditation are eternal and imperishable; they alone obtain these, who have such pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਟਲੈ ਨ ਟਲਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal masatak lekh likhiaa so ttalai na ttalaadhaa |
lines.english: The inscription inscribed upon one's forehead is eternal and imperishable; it cannot be avoided by avoidance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਆਰਾਧਾ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa tin sadaa sadaa aaraadhaa |19|
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny worship and adore the Lord, forever and ever. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਾਧ ਜਨ ਬਚਨ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal sangat saadh jan bachan nihachal gur saadhaa |
lines.english: The Congregation, the Company of the Holy, and the word of the humble, are eternal and imperishable. The Holy Guru is eternal and imperishable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਰੇਦੜੋ ਭੀ ਤਾਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਿਰ ਸਿਉ ਰਤਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taaredarro bhee taar naanak pir siau ratiaa |1|
lines.english: One who is imbued with the Love of the Husband Lord - O Nanak, he himself is saved, and he saves others as well. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਡੁਬੰਦੋ ਆਪਿ ਸੋ ਤਰਾਏ ਕਿਨੑ ਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo ddubando aap so taraae kina khe |
lines.english: One who himself has drowned - how can he carry anyone else across?

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂੰ ਜੁਲਾਊਂ ਤਥਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਿਰੀ ਪਸੰਦੋ ਹਰਿਓ ਥੀਓਸਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: moon julaaoon tath naanak piree pasando hario theeos |2|
lines.english: that is where I go, O Nanak, to see Him, and blossom forth in bliss. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਕੋਇ ਕਥੰਨਿ ਨਾਉ ਸੁਣੰਦੋ ਮਾ ਪਿਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jithai koe kathan naau sunando maa piree |
lines.english: Wherever someone speaks and hears the Name of my Beloved Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਸਨੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: meree meree kiaa kareh putr kalatr saneh |
lines.english: You are in love with your children and your wife; why do you keep calling them your own?

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣੀਆ ਨਿਮੁਣੀਆਦੀ ਦੇਹ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vihooneea nimuneeaadee deh |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the human body has no foundation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਨੀ ਦੇਖਉ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨੋ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਮਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: nainee dekhau gur darasano gur charanee mathaa |
lines.english: With my eyes, I gaze upon the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan; I touch my forehead to the Guru's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੈਰੀ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਗੁਰ ਚਲਦਾ ਪਖਾ ਫੇਰੀ ਹਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: pairee maarag gur chaladaa pakhaa feree hathaa |
lines.english: With my feet I walk on the Guru's Path; with my hands, I wave the fan over Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਜਪੰਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: akaal moorat ridai dhiaaeidaa din rain japanthaa |
lines.english: I meditate on Akaal Moorat, the undying form, within my heart; day and night, I meditate on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਛਡਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਅਪਾਇਣੋ ਭਰਵਾਸੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਮਰਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: mai chhaddiaa sagal apaaeino bharavaasai gur samarathaa |
lines.english: I have renounced all possessiveness, and have placed my faith in the all-powerful Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਬਖਸਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਸਭੋ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur bakhasiaa naam nidhaan sabho dukh lathaa |
lines.english: The Guru has blessed me with the treasure of the Naam; I am rid of all sufferings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਗਹੁ ਭੁੰਚਹੁ ਭਾਈਹੋ ਪਲੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਗਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhogahu bhunchahu bhaaeeho palai naam agathaa |
lines.english: Eat and enjoy the Naam, the Name of the indescribable Lord, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਦਿੜੁ ਸਦਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam daan isanaan dirr sadaa karahu gur kathaa |
lines.english: Confirm your faith in the Naam, charity and self-purification; chant the Guru's sermon forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੁ ਭਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਲਥਾ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: sehaj bheaa prabh paaeaa jam kaa bhau lathaa |20|
lines.english: Blessed with intuitive poise, I have found God; I am rid of the fear of the Messenger of Death. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਗੜੀਆ ਪਿਰੀਅੰਨਿ ਪੇਖੰਦੀਆ ਨਾ ਤਿਪੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: lagarreea pireean pekhandeea naa tipeea |
lines.english: I am centered and focused on my Beloved, but I am not satisfied, even by seeing Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭ ਮਝਾਹੂ ਸੋ ਧਣੀ ਬਿਆ ਨ ਡਿਠੋ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: habh majhaahoo so dhanee biaa na ddittho koe |1|
lines.english: The Lord and Master is within all; I do not see any other. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥੜੀਆ ਸੰਤਾਹ ਤੇ ਸੁਖਾਊ ਪੰਧੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: katharreea santaah te sukhaaoo pandheea |
lines.english: The sayings of the Saints are the paths of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਧੜੀਆ ਤਿੰਨਾਹ ਜਿਨਾ ਭਾਗੁ ਮਥਾਹੜੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak ladharreea tinaah jinaa bhaag mathaaharrai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone obtain them, upon whose foreheads such destiny is written. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੂੰਗਰਿ ਜਲਾ ਥਲਾ ਭੂਮਿ ਬਨਾ ਫਲ ਕੰਦਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: ddoongar jalaa thalaa bhoom banaa fal kandaraa |
lines.english: He is totally permeating the mountains, oceans, deserts, lands, forests, orchards, caves,

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਤਾਲਾ ਆਕਾਸ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਹਭ ਘਟਾ ॥
lines.translit: paataalaa aakaas pooran habh ghattaa |
lines.english: the nether regions of the underworld, the Akaashic ethers of the skies, and all hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੇਖਿ ਜੀਓ ਇਕਤੁ ਸੂਤਿ ਪਰੋਤੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak pekh jeeo ikat soot paroteea |3|
lines.english: Nanak sees that they are all strung on the same thread. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਮਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਪਿਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਕ ॥
lines.translit: har jee maataa har jee pitaa har jeeo pratipaalak |
lines.english: The Dear Lord is my mother, the Dear Lord is my father; the Dear Lord cherishes and nurtures me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਖਿਲਾਇਦਾ ਨਹੀ ਕਰਦਾ ਆਲਕ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje sehaj khilaaeidaa nahee karadaa aalak |
lines.english: Slowly and steadily, He feeds me; He never fails.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਸਾਰ ਕਰੇ ਹਮ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਬਾਲਕ ॥
lines.translit: har jee meree saar kare ham har ke baalak |
lines.english: The Dear Lord takes care of me; I am the child of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹਿ ਮੰਗਾਂ ਸੋਈ ਦੇਵਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਇਕ ॥
lines.translit: muhi mangaan soee devadaa har pitaa sukhadaaeik |
lines.english: Whatever I ask for, He give me; the Lord is my peace-giving father.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣੁ ਕੋ ਨ ਚਿਤਾਰਦਾ ਗਲ ਸੇਤੀ ਲਾਇਕ ॥
lines.translit: aaugan ko na chitaaradaa gal setee laaeik |
lines.english: He does not remind me of my faults; He hugs me close in His embrace.
